name: Silent Swordsman
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>沈</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>黙</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－サイレント・ソードマン
desc: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned (from your hand) by Tributing 1 Warrior monster. Once per turn, during the Standby Phase: This card gains 500 ATK. Once per turn, when a Spell Card is activated (Quick Effect): You can negate the activation. If this card is destroyed by battle, or if this card in its owner's control is destroyed by an opponent's card effect: You can Special Summon 1 "Silent Swordsman" monster from your hand or Deck, except "Silent Swordsman", ignoring its Summoning conditions.

sets.set: Duelist Pack: Rivals of the Pharaoh
